_comment: Pinned reference = the plugin versions the mainline FeedBack game ships, captured from the live desktop plugin set. launch.ps1's preflight asserts the dev host's graded-through / borrowed siblings match these, so 'green on my dev host' tracks 'works in the game' instead of drifting silently. RE-CAPTURE on each host-release overlap sweep (ROADMAP standing ritual) and bump capturedDate.
capturedFrom: %LOCALAPPDATA%/Temp/slopsmith/plugins  (live desktop extraction = what the game actually runs)

note_detect.note: The verifier Virtuoso grades through. Below 1.15.x the contained-verifier API is absent and grading silently falls back to setVerifyTarget — the 'green notes don't fire' class of ghost.

minigames.note: The host scoring SDK (slopsmithMinigames) the pitch tracker uses. Absent host -> no scoring.

highway_3d.note: Borrowed 3D viz + native hit-flare. Dev hosts currently ship 3.22.0 (drift) — surfaced as a WARN.

nam_tone.note: Optional borrowed amp-capture tone for live input.
